title: NyxCore: On-Device TinyML Watchdog for ROS 2
description: An independent ESP32-S3 watchdog that monitors a robot's DDS streams and keeps reporting even when the main compute node stalls or crashes. Runs anomaly inference in pure C with no ML runtime: a Mahalanobis distance scorer and a sub-400-byte autoencoder baked into firmware, shipped as a managed micro-ROS lifecycle node on FreeRTOS.
